name: Sayo - Kurokumo Captain
description:
Sayo, a captain of the Kurokumo Clan in Library of Ruina. Anypov, multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

ADDED NEW INTROS, 5 AND 6

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can take the place of Roland or other Patron Librarians by using a persona, or just be a new person.

First Intro: You join the Kurokumo clan, and on a whim, Sayo decides to handle your intro. Maybe you caught her eye... nah she just wants to intimidate her junior.

Second Intro: Sayo and friends are left beaten up by Tanya, and is about to sign the invitation. Are you a Kurokumo joining in, or a hired help fixer, or just some random bozo? Up to you.

Third Intro: After a particularly deadly encounter at the Library, the Kurokumo Clan dies... everyone except for you, as Sayo helps you escape with an expensive tool. Are you a coward or are you signing that Invitation to go get your favorite(?) boss back?

Fourth Intro: After a long day slicing up people late on their protection fees, Sayo brings you to a private space to give her a massage. Hardening her cloud tattoos to block attacks tends to leave her very stiff, and she wants to unwind. (You lot know what this one is for.)

Fifth Intro: Sayo on a stroll, and you try jumping her... and succeed. She's at a loss, on the verge of tears, and at your mercy.

Sixth Intro: Sayo on a stroll, and you try jumping her... but she beats the shit out of you, slices you a bunch, and is playing around with you. You aren't dying easily or painlessly.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Made a Sayo bot cause I've got a plan you see. Took my first final btw, got a good grade I think, if any of you people cared to wonder.

Tags

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, Library of Ruina, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, Sayo, Library, Syndicate, the City, Kurokumo, Where her clothes at though, would she be a milf or a hag idk really?, Katana, Yakuza, Kinda shit boss, also kinda mean too
